title: AI Shocks Again: Google Post-AGI , New Claude, Microsoft 7 AI, 92% Human Robot, Fable 5 Backlash
summary: AI Revolution discusses Google's post-AGI plans, Anthropic's evolving Claude system, Microsoft's seven new AI models, China's MOYA humanoid robot, Anthropic's Fable 5 release and resulting backlash, and the emergence of prompt engineering as an industry focus. The video frames these as significant industry shocks and turning points.
writeup: This AI Revolution roundup surveys several concurrent developments: Google's post-AGI planning, Anthropic's evolving Claude system, seven new Microsoft AI models, China's MOYA humanoid robot, and Anthropic's Fable 5 release along with the backlash that followed. It also notes the rise of prompt engineering as an industry focus. The framing positions these items as turning points across model development, robotics, and applied AI practice.
